headline: Colombia cruise, Ghana grin, and Panama get mugged off
text: A decent little shake-up: Chris’s Colombia have done the business, while Sara’s Ghana edged Panama and gave Emily another nudge in the right direction. The only draw of the lot left Carolina and Rosaria sharing the points, so neither can exactly crack open the bubbly. At the top, Grandad is still best overall on 7 points, with Nana and Christopher breathing down the necks on 6. At the wrong end, Sofia remains bottom with a very grim 1 point, and Jack is still stuck in the danger zone on 3. A right mixed bag, really — some soaring, some scraping.
